message:
fix: nightly E2E card shows empty state during cold start (#10892)

The demoWhenEmpty logic only checked Array.isArray(data), but the
nightly E2E data is an object { guides: [], isDemo: false } which
is always truthy.  First-time visitors saw all-zeros until the
Netlify Function responded.

- Add isEmpty callback to useCache so hooks with object-shaped data
  can define what "empty" means for optimistic demo display
- Wire isEmpty in useNightlyE2EData to check guides array content
- Add stale-while-revalidate to the Netlify Function: serve stale
  cached data (up to 1 hour) when GitHub API fetch fails, preventing
  502 errors from surfacing as empty cards

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -72,8 +72,9 @@ export function useNightlyE2EData() {
     demoData: { guides: DEMO_DATA, isDemo: true },
     persist: true,
     refreshInterval,
-    demoWhenEmpty: true, // Show demo data immediately during cold start instead of skeleton loading
-    liveInDemoMode: isNetlifyDeployment, // Only fetch live in demo mode on console.kubestellar.io
+    demoWhenEmpty: true,
+    isEmpty: (d) => !d.guides || d.guides.length === 0 || d.guides.every(g => (g.runs || []).length === 0),
+    liveInDemoMode: isNetlifyDeployment,
     fetcher: async () => {
       // Try authenticated endpoint first, then public fallback
       const endpoints = ['/api/nightly-e2e/runs', '/api/public/nightly-e2e/runs']
